Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the custom permissions profile.

AddOrRunAnomalyDetectionForAnalyses.description: The ability to add or run anomaly detection.

Analysis.description: The ability to perform analysis-related actions.

CreateAndUpdateDashboardEmailReports.description: The ability to create and update email reports.

CreateAndUpdateDataSources.description: The ability to create and update data sources.

CreateAndUpdateDatasets.description: The ability to create and update datasets.

CreateAndUpdateThemes.description: The ability to export to Create and Update themes.

CreateAndUpdateThresholdAlerts.description: The ability to create and update threshold alerts.

CreateSPICEDataset.description: The ability to create a SPICE dataset.

CreateSharedFolders.description: The ability to create shared folders.

Dashboard.description: The ability to perform dashboard-related actions.

ExportToCsv.description: The ability to export to CSV files from the UI.

ExportToCsvInScheduledReports.description: The ability to export to CSV files in scheduled email reports.

ExportToExcel.description: The ability to export to Excel files from the UI.

ExportToExcelInScheduledReports.description: The ability to export to Excel files in scheduled email reports.

ExportToPdf.description: The ability to export to PDF files from the UI.

ExportToPdfInScheduledReports.description: The ability to export to PDF files in scheduled email reports.

IncludeContentInScheduledReportsEmail.description: The ability to include content in scheduled email reports.

RenameSharedFolders.description: The ability to rename shared folders.

ShareDataSources.description: The ability to share data sources.

SubscribeDashboardEmailReports.description: The ability to subscribe to email reports.

ViewAccountSPICECapacity.description: The ability to view account SPICE capacity.

Capabilities.description: A set of actions that correspond to Amazon Quick Sight permissions.

AwsAccountId.description: The ID of the AWS account that contains the custom permission configuration that you want to update.

Capabilities.description: A set of actions in the custom permissions profile.

CustomPermissionsName.description: The name of the custom permissions profile.

Tags.description: The tags to associate with the custom permissions profile.
